# Ökade risker i finanssektorn: "Spelreglerna gäller för alla"

**Feed**: dagen-med-di  
**Published**: 2026-06-20  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode is an interview with Jimmy Kvarnström, head of markets at Finansinspektionen (the Swedish FSA), about rising risks in the financial sector following several high-profile suspected insider trading cases. The discussion centers on market trust, improved surveillance technology, the shared responsibility of institutions, and elevated cyber/geopolitical risks — but no individual companies or stocks are discussed.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
